zh.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Merrick於1620年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親John Meyrick41歲，母親Dorothy Bishop46歲。他於1639年9月14日與Sarah Stebbins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1630年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利且於1636年住在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。他去世於1704年9月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年84歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Merrick于1620年出生在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可时，他的父亲John Meyrick41岁，母亲Dorothy Bishop46岁。他于1639年9月14日与Sarah Stebbins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1630年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利且于1636年住在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。他去世于1704年9月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年84岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Merrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Myrick
meanings: Welsh (Monmouthshire): variant of   Merrick  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Merricks
meanings: Welsh: variant of Merrick , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Merrick was born in 1620, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, John Meyrick, was 41 and his mother, Dorothy Bishop, was 46. He married Sarah Stebbins on 14 September 1639, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He lived in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1630 and Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States in 1636. He died on 7 September 1704, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Merrick est né en 1620, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, John Meyrick, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Bishop, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Stebbins le 14 septembre 1639, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1630 et à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis en 1636. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1704, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Merrick 1620 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Meyrick 41 und seine Mutter Dorothy Bishop 46. Er hat am 14. September 1639 in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Stebbins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1630 hat er in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1636 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 7. September 1704 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Merrick è nato il nel 1620 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, John Meyrick, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Bishop, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Stebbins il 14 settembre 1639, nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1630 e nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1636. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Merrickが1620年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父John Meyrickは41歳，母Dorothy Bishopは46歳であった。1639年9月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでSarah Stebbinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに，1636年にはアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1704年9月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで84歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Merrick(이)가 1620년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Meyrick(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Bishop(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1639년 9월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 Sarah Stebbins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1630년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서, 1636년도에 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 살았다. 그는 1704년 9월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Merrick nasceu em 1620, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, John Meyrick, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Bishop, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Stebbins em 14 de setembro de 1639, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1630 e em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América em 1636. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1704, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Merrick родился в 1620 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени John Meyrick было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Bishop, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Stebbins 14 сентября 1639 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1630 году и в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в 1636 году. Он умер 7 сентября 1704 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Merrick nació en 1620, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, John Meyrick, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Dorothy Bishop, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sarah Stebbins el 14 de septiembre de 1639, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Vivió en Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1630 y en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos en 1636. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1704, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
